caption:
Unique Places in New York City 📍Japan Village🇯🇵

Location:
📍934 3rd Ave Brooklyn NY 11232(Industry City)

Transit details:
Take the N, R, or D train from Manhattan to the 36th Street station in Brooklyn

#nyc #food #travel #NewYork #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Did you know that New York City has a full-on Japan village? Inside of an old shipping hub in industry city Brooklyn, you'll find a little piece of Japan where you can try imported treats, snacks, meats, and goods. But we're not done yet because you can explore the food hall and enjoy unique ramen dishes, udon noodles, takoyaki, and desserts. Climb to the second floor and you'll step into this giant hub of Japanese stores with games, activities, collector items, and cool stuff you can't easily find in America. And finally, if you're feeling thirsty, head next door and finish off your visit with a sake flight at Brooklyn Kura, one of the few authentic sake breweries in New York City. Follow for more New York City tours.
